_README: Curated, KG-verified canonical CURIEs for a small high-confidence subset of each frailty module's analytes, used as the entity-resolution recall ground truth (checks.py::check_entity_resolution_recall, exact match). Selection rule mirrors tests/fixtures/entity_resolution_hard_variants.json: genes -> the well-connected HUMAN NCBIGene node (not the higher-scored ortholog hybrid_search returns for a bare symbol); metabolites -> the canonical CHEBI node (not the higher-scored FOODON/MESH hit). Verified against the live Kestrel KG via hybrid_search on 2026-06-03. Recall MAY legitimately fail here if the pipeline resolves to a non-canonical node (e.g. taurine->FOODON) -- that is a real, intended quality signal, not a bad fixture. Consumed by generate_frailty_prompts.py (values become each case's expected_curies). Format: {Module: {analyte_display_name: CURIE}}.
